description_long: This is a rectangular black serving tray with a slightly raised edge, containing a serving of food. The tray holds a generous portion of a bean or chickpea-based dish with a reddish sauce, garnished with green herbs, and accompanied by a side of golden French fries and a small portion of shredded purple cabbage. The tray itself appears to be made of a hard, matte material, likely plastic or melamine, with a subtle ribbed texture on the base. The food is neatly arranged, with the fries and cabbage separated from the main dish. The overall presentation is clean and modern, suitable for casual dining or street food service in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular black serving tray with a raised edge, holding a bean-based dish, fries, and shredded cabbage. The tray has a matte, ribbed surface and a modern, clean appearance.
description_view_0: The tray is viewed from the side, showing the bean dish on the right and fries with cabbage on the left, with the raised edge clearly visible.
description_view_1: The tray is seen from the end, with the fries and cabbage in the foreground and the bean dish behind, emphasizing the depth and arrangement of the food.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the bean dish on the left and fries with cabbage on the right, highlighting the separation of food items.
description_view_3: The tray is viewed from the other end, with the cabbage and fries in the foreground and the bean dish behind, mirroring view 1 but from the opposite direction.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is slightly raised, approximately 1 cm in height, with a flat, unadorned edge and moderate thickness, providing containment for the food.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface of the tray appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The food items have a natural, slightly glossy appearance, but the tray itself remains uniformly matte.
